heading: Relationship to State law
label: 32711 Relationship to State law
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3271115:1991., , ; , , .Oct. 20, 1972July 14, 1976Pub. L. 92–513, § 41886 Stat. 963Pub. L. 94–364, § 408(1)90 Stat. 984In this section, before clause (1), the words “and then only to the extent of the inconsistency” are omitted as surplus. In clause (1), the word “affect” is substituted for “annul, alter, or affect” to eliminate unnecessary words. In clause (2), the words “subject to the provisions of this subchapter” are omitted as surplus.

children.text: affect a State law on disconnecting, altering, or tampering with an odometer with intent to defraud; or
exempt a person from complying with that law.
